description: Asked David to identify Speaker 1 in the Apr 21 Plaud recording instead of checking the calendar first. Outlook calendar clearly showed 'Lunch with Brian Schultz @ Hudson House, Preston Forest' at noon on Apr 21 — matching the recording time. The sample text ('Movie business') also corroborated via bschultz@lookcinemas.com (Look Cinemas). The information was fully available without user input.
correction: Check calendar attendees for the recording's date and time window BEFORE surfacing speaker identification questions to the controller. Only ask David if calendar cross-reference genuinely fails to resolve the identity.
systemic_fix: Update plaud-speaker-id skill (step-03): always run calendar lookup for recording time window first. Only surface to controller if zero attendee matches or multiple ambiguous matches exist after calendar check.
